pyepo.model.omo.portfolio
=========================

.. py:module:: pyepo.model.omo.portfolio

.. autoapi-nested-parse::

   Portfolio problem



Attributes
----------

.. autoapisummary::

   pyepo.model.omo.portfolio.optmodel


Classes
-------

.. autoapisummary::

   pyepo.model.omo.portfolio.portfolioModel


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:class:: portfolioModel(num_assets: int, covariance: numpy.ndarray, gamma: float = 2.25, solver: str = 'ipopt')

   Bases: :py:obj:`pyepo.model.bases.portfolioBase`, :py:obj:`pyepo.model.omo.omomodel.optOmoModel`


   Pyomo-backed Markowitz portfolio.

   :ivar _model: Pyomo model
   :vartype _model: Pyomo model
   :ivar solver: optimization solver in the background
   :vartype solver: str
   :ivar num_assets: number of assets
   :vartype num_assets: int
   :ivar covariance: covariance matrix of the returns
   :vartype covariance: numpy.ndarray
   :ivar risk_level: risk level

   :vartype risk_level: float


.. py:data:: optmodel
